SHADOWFALL_GLORY_DYNAMIC.title: Glory {Glory}
SHADOWFALL_GLORY_DYNAMIC.description: If you have played at least [blue]{Glory}[/blue] cards this turn, trigger an additional effect.
SHADOWFALL_GLORY_STATIC.title: Glory
SHADOWFALL_GLORY_STATIC.description: If you have played a certain number of cards during your turn, trigger an additional effect.
CARGO_PILE.title: Cargo Pile
CARGO_PILE.description:
At the start of each turn,
an extra card is drawn from here.

Click to view the cards in your Cargo pile (in order).
LOAD_AMMO.title: Loading Ammo & Volley
LOAD_AMMO.description: The first time you load [gold]Ammo[/gold] each turn, add a [gold]Shell Volley[/gold] to your [gold]Hand[/gold]. Adds additional repeats to [gold]Shell Volley[/gold]
